---
title: "Week 9: Agentic AI I"
subtitle: "Agents as Workflow Systems"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Reading Assignment
Complete this reading before Week 10.
:::

## Overview

*Content coming soon.*

## Key Concepts

- Introduction to agentic AI
- Agent-based workflows
- LLM integration patterns
- Agent-human interaction

## Further Reading

### Testing Web Applications
- [Web Application Testing for QA Teams: A Step-by-Step Guide](https://www.virtuosoqa.com/post/testing-web-applications)
- [Jest Documentation](https://jestjs.io/docs/getting-started)
- [Supertest Documentation](https://github.com/ladjs/supertest)
- [Playwright Testing Documentation](https://playwright.dev/docs/intro)
- [Testing Pyramid (Martin Fowler)](https://martinfowler.com/articles/practical-test-pyramid.html)
- [Google Testing Blog](https://testing.googleblog.com/)
